description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the default runner image and runs a global before_script to install pandoc with `apt-get update -qq && apt-get install -y -qq pandoc`. Define a single stage called deploy and add a job named pages that runs in this stage, executes the shell commands `make clean` and then `make`, publishes the `public` directory as an artifact, and is limited to the master branch via an only rule.
